Index.title: Biblik Debat
Index.hero_subtitle: Study the Word. Share Your Thoughts. Grow Spiritually.

Auth.has_account: Already have an account? Sign in

Admin.welcome: Welcome to the Biblik Debat administration panel.

Landing.step1_desc: Find a community, church, or study group to connect with believers worldwide.
Landing.step2_desc: Every debate must be rooted in the Bible. Select a verse and start the discussion.
Landing.step3_desc: Use text, voice messages, or our AI assistant to dive deep into theological truths.
Landing.feature1_desc: WhatsApp-style real-time voice messaging. Hold to record and instantly broadcast your thoughts to the group.
Landing.feature2_desc: Ask deep theological questions and get instant, scripture-backed answers from our advanced AI learning tool.
Landing.feature3_desc: No internet? No problem. Read debates and queue messages offline. We automatically sync when you reconnect.
Landing.cta_title: Ready to grow in faith together?
Landing.cta_desc: Create an account today and join thousands of believers discussing Scripture.

AI.title: Biblik AI Assistant
AI.desc: Ask Bible questions, explore topics, and get scripture insights.
AI.greeting: How can I help you understand the Bible today?
AI.q3: Create a Bible study on faith

Groups.communities_desc: Join a group to study the Bible together.
Groups.error: Error loading groups. Ensure the database schema is created.
Groups.no_groups_desc: Be the first to create a community!
Groups.no_debates_desc: Start a discussion by referencing a Bible verse!

Debates.share_thoughts: Share your thoughts on this verse...

Voice.title: Live Voice Chat
Voice.no_messages: No voice messages yet. Be the first to speak!
Voice.desc: Hold the microphone to send a voice message to everyone in {name}.
